command:
export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/router/logs"
export AGENT_ROLE="router"
export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="S6INREPO"
export AGENT_CARD_ID="pv4px0"
export AGENT_CYCLE="1"
cd /home/cameron/projects/deepnote
source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh
agent_log_init
echo "log initialized"

export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/router/logs"
export AGENT_ROLE="router"
export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="S6INREPO"
export AGENT_CARD_ID="mjporx"
export AGENT_CYCLE="1"
source /home/cameron/projects/deepnote/.gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh
agent_log_event "write-executor-inbox" '{"file":".gitban/agents/executor/inbox/S6INREPO-mjporx-executor-1.md"}'
agent_log_event "card-update" '{"action":"append"}'
echo "logged"
